name: NPG card session is created with expected card form fields

steps.name: Given the eCommerce CDC environment variables are configured
Given the CDC credit card payment method id is resolved
When I create a CDC NPG card session
Then the CDC response has status code 200
And the NPG session contains four card form fields
And the NPG session has payment method CARDS
And the NPG session has a valid order id

fullName: eCommerce CDC service — Integration tests: NPG card session is created with expected card form fields
